title: Holocaust Memorial Day Act
description: Holocaust Memorial Day Act (Holocaust Memorial Day Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Holocaust Memorial Day Act .

provisions.title: Holocaust Memorial Day — Yom ha-Shoah
provisions.content: 2 Yom ha-Shoah or the Day of the Holocaust, as determined in each year by the Jewish lunar calendar, is proclaimed as “Holocaust Memorial Day — Yom ha-Shoah”.
